title: Astral Pipes is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Astral Pipes is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Astral Pipes has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Tiruchirappalli office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Astral Pipes:
Astral Pipes is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Astral Pipes!
